station_code: Must match an existing station code in INMACOM database
value: Precipitation total over the measurement period (numeric)
unit: mm  (millimetres — standard for all rainfall records)
duration_hours: Length of measurement period in hours (e.g. 24 for daily, 1 for hourly, event duration for storm events)
start_time: HH:MM (24-hour, optional)  e.g. 08:30 — start of accumulation period (optional for daily)
end_time: HH:MM (24-hour, optional)  e.g. 08:30 — end of accumulation period (optional for daily)
measurement_method: tipping_bucket | manual_gauge | siphon_gauge | radar | satellite | interpolated
